content:
## ☿ MERCURY (Design) — Gate 32.4

**Theme**: Preservation / Continuity
**Trait**: You speak to what should endure.
**Line 4**: Stabilizes through connections — you articulate ancestral or traditional continuity.

---

## ☽ MOON (Personality) — Gate 10.4

**Theme**: Self-love / Behavior Modeling
**Trait**: Your emotional drive comes from walking your own path.
**Line 4**: Your example impacts your community.

---

## ☽ MOON (Design) — Gate 57.2

**Theme**: Intuitive Clarity / Instant Knowing
**Trait**: Body-based decisions. You “just know” things before they happen.
**Line 2**: Unconscious gift — emerges only when relaxed or called out.

---

## ♀ VENUS (Personality) — Gate 55.2

**Theme**: Spirit / Emoting / Abundance
**Trait**: You value emotional richness + inner freedom.
**Line 2**: Expressed through solitude. Emotional genius from within.
